name: pipeline-core
description: Agent-Pipeline operating model as an installable unit: session bootstrap (pipeline-start), independent review dispatch (critic-review), session close ritual (close-block), Goldfish/Critic subagents, git-guard union hooks. Deliberately WITHOUT a version field: this plugin is in its SHA phase, where every commit counts as a new version and propagates on refresh; SemVer + tags start once the stability phase begins.
